channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: CPH Target Runner - Thu Apr 30 04:42:00 UTC 2026
item.description:
A CLion sidebar helper for competitive-programming samples. Manage sample cases per CMake target, run them quickly, compare outputs, and inspect mismatched lines.
vendor: kkkzbh downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.kkkzbh.cph

item.title: velk - Thu Apr 30 07:34:47 UTC 2026
item.description:
Open the velk terminal AI harness in a JetBrains terminal panel. Tools → velk: Open REPL (or Ctrl/Cmd-Shift-A → "velk") spawns a terminal running the velk binary in...
vendor: Vincent Vella downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.vincentvella.velk

item.title: OpenClaw - Wed Apr 29 20:58:48 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: gguf downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.gguf.openclaw

item.title: Inline Unified Diff - Wed Apr 29 20:44:13 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Clement Sehan downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.clementsehan.inlineunifieddiffjetbrains

item.title: LuaAttachDebug - Wed Apr 29 14:10:35 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: kibernet downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.kibernet.LuaAttachDebug

item.title: Vault Toolbox - Wed Apr 29 00:48:53 UTC 2026

item.title: LuaUnity - Wed Apr 29 11:48:09 UTC 2026
